voice.tone: Professional and reassuring. Speaks to property owners with authority and to tenants with warmth and clarity.
voice.errors: Professional and specific. Payment processing errors include next steps. Maintenance submission failures offer alternative contact methods.
voice.loading: Property card skeletons with address line placeholders. Financial tables show column headers while data loads. Tenant portal uses gentle fade-in transitions.
voice.empty_states: Helpful and onboarding-oriented. An empty property list should guide through adding the first property with clear steps. Tenant portal empty states should reassure that everything is in order.
